description_long: This is a sealed retail package of Faragello Frozen Green Beans, designed for consumer purchase and storage. The front of the bag prominently displays the Faragello brand logo in red and white, along with an image of cut green beans and bilingual labeling in English and Arabic. The packaging is made of a flexible, semi-glossy plastic material, typical for frozen food products, and is filled with air to maintain the shape and protect the contents. The back of the package features detailed nutritional information, ingredients, and multilingual product descriptions. The sides of the bag are narrow and show minimal graphics, emphasizing the pillow-like, slightly inflated form of the packaging.
description: A sealed, pillow-shaped plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Green Beans with vivid branding and product imagery on the front, and nutritional information on the back.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a photo of green beans against a white background.
description_view_1: The left side view is very narrow, showing the edge seam of the bag and partial graphics wrapping from the front and back.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product information, with less prominent branding.
description_view_3: The right side view is also narrow, showing the edge seam and a small portion of the nutritional label and graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The Faragello brand logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a red rectangular background with white stylized text and a graphic element above the name.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states 'Frozen Green Beans' in both English and Arabic, with an image of green beans.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories, serving size, and other nutritional information.
